# 📱 TASKORA — COMPLETE OPEN DESIGN UI MASTER DOCUMENT

# 🎯 MAIN DESIGN GOAL

Design style must feel like:

✅ Smart productivity workspace
✅ Interactive timeline dashboard
✅ Floating modern utility system
✅ Clean Apple-quality spacing
✅ Soft glassmorphism + workspace feel
✅ Not boring list UI
✅ Every screen should feel alive

The entire app UI should look like:

```text
Apple Productivity App + Linear + Notion + Smart Timeline Workspace
```

NO basic cards.
NO simple table lists.
NO boring forms.

Everything must feel:

```text
interactive
expandable
layered
smooth
premium
```

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

# 🎨 GLOBAL DESIGN SYSTEM

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

# 🌈 COLORS

## Primary

Royal Violet

```text
#7C3AED
```

Use for:

```text
Main buttons
Highlights
Icons
Selected states
Floating action wheel
Progress indicators
```

---

## Accent

Fresh Lime

```text
#A3E635
```

Use for:

```text
Success states
Live counters
Active indicators
Badges
Glow effects
```

---

## Background

Warm Gray

```text
#F5F5F4
```

Main app background.

---

## Surface

```text
#FFFFFF
```

Expandable sections
